questions.question: What California town was named for what 49ers often yelled when they struck gold?
What TV star refused to perform in the early 1970s until being served a morning biscuit?
What Public Enemy paid a doc to obliterate his fingerprints with acid, only to have them grow back just as they'd been before?
What program was Bill Gates demonstrating at a 1998 Chicago trade fair, when it crashed on him?
What 41-year-old boxer's 1997 comeback was cut short by a series of blows to the head by Hector Camacho?
What lamb dish is favored by members of the all-Bob club, Bobs International?
